title: PC360 - 1000 Hour Service
description: Engine oil and filter change. Hydraulic filter replacement. Greased all pivot pins and track rollers. Undercarriage inspection - 70% remaining on track pads. All systems operational.

title: Manitowoc 2250 - Annual Load Test & Inspection
description: Annual load test completed at 125% capacity. Wire rope inspection - main hoist rope replaced (1800 ft). Boom section inspections completed. Crane certified for next 12 months. All documentation filed.

title: Liebherr Tower Crane - Mast Section Addition
description: Added 2 mast sections to raise tower crane tip height from 320 ft to 380 ft as structure climbed. Climbing frame operation performed by OEM certified technician. Post-climb inspection passed.

title: Genie SX-180 - Tire Replacement
description: Replaced 4 drive tires due to uneven wear identified in safety inspection. Tires sourced same day. Machine returned to service following day. Root cause - overloading on soft ground at perimeter.

title: CAT D6T - Track Adjustment & Pad Replacement
description: Track pad replacement - both sides (pads at 30% remaining). Tension adjustment. Final drive oil sample pulled and analyzed. Blade cutting edge replaced. Machine ready for Denver project.

title: Grove RT890 - Annual Inspection
description: Full annual inspection per ASME B30.5. Hydraulic cylinders seals inspected. Load chart verified and posted. Outrigger pads inspected. All certifications current. Ready for Austin tower crane support.
